title: ochna lucens
intro: Ochna lucens is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the family Ochnaceae, commonly known as the "African sour-plum" due to its fruit's sour taste. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ochna lucens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support digestive health. The herbal preparations of this plant may involve infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
